rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE BESSIE GIN CHAN REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST (UDT AUG. 3 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Dexter Chans Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Re: Trustees Discovery Responses
rulings.Rulings: Dexter Chan's motion to compel is granted. Trustee must provide Dexter with her original discovery responses and verifications dated July 6, 2015 and must amend her response to RFP No. 14 within 15 days of the order. The request for sanctions is deferred. If trustee fully complies with the order, then the request will go off calendar. If the trustee fails to comply, sanctions will be ordered in the amount requested. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling must notify the court and opposing counsel no later than 9/22/2015, at 4:00 p.m.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE BESSIE GIN CHAN REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST (UDT AUG. 3 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Compliance To Agreement To Inspection Demands; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Declaration Of Peter H. Bresler In Support Of Motion To Compel; Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion To Compel; Statement Of Items In Dispute Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: Sandra Chan Yee's motion to compel is denied. The respective requests for sanctions are denied. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative must notify the court and opposing counsel no later than September 22, 2015, at 4:00 p.m.
